title: agrostis canina var. hyemalis
intro: Agrostis canina var. hyemalis, also known as winter bent or winter crowfoot, is a variety of grass that belongs to the poaceae family and is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Agrostis canina var. hyemalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and act as a natural expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. Agrostis canina var. hyemalis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
